name: A Texas Breakfast Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9 inch Pyrex dish with rolls, sealing perforations.
2. Cover the bottom of the dish with sausage, mushrooms, and half the cheese.
3. Mix eggs with soup and pour over the casserole layers.
4. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
5. Chill overnight.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
Note: For variation, you can use cooked, crumbled bacon or bite-sized pieces of ham instead of sausage.
